---
title: "Research"
---


```{=html}
<div style="padding: 5rem 0; background: white;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-title-wrapper">
      <span class="section-badge badge-navy">Research Focus</span>
      <h2>Our Research Areas</h2>
      <div class="gold-line"></div>
      <p style="color: #666; max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto; font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.8;">
        Our research spans a broad spectrum of statistical and actuarial
        disciplines, united by the goal of advancing quantitative risk
        assessment methodologies.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="row g-4">
  <!-- 1. Climate Risk Modelling -->
  <div class="col-md-4">
    <div class="research-card">
      <div class="research-card-icon"><img src="images/climate.png" alt="Climate Risk" style="width: 56px; height: 56px; object-fit: contain;"></div>
      <div class="research-card-title">Climate Risk Modelling</div>
      <div class="research-card-text">
        Developing spatial and temporal models for extreme weather events,
        seasonal forecasting, and climate-resilient insurance pricing across
        African regions. This includes heatwaves, drought, and flood risk assessment.
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- 2. Machine Learning & AI -->
  <div class="col-md-4">
    <div class="research-card">
      <div class="research-card-icon"><img src="images/ml.png" alt="Machine Learning" style="width: 56px; height: 56px; object-fit: contain;"></div>
      <div class="research-card-title">Machine Learning & AI</div>
      <div class="research-card-text">
        Applying deep learning, neural networks, and ensemble methods to
        insurance and health datasets for improved prediction and risk classification.
        We explore supervised and unsupervised learning for actuarial applications.
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- 3. Health & Survival Analysis -->
  <div class="col-md-4">
    <div class="research-card">
      <div class="research-card-icon"><img src="images/survival.png" alt="Health and Survival" style="width: 56px; height: 56px; object-fit: contain;"></div>
      <div class="research-card-title">Health & Survival Analysis</div>
      <div class="research-card-text">
        Studying mortality trends, infectious disease dynamics, and longevity risk
        using survival analysis and machine learning methods. This includes
        under-five mortality, maternal health, and Bayesian mortality projections.
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- 4. Spatial Statistics -->
  <div class="col-md-4">
    <div class="research-card">
      <div class="research-card-icon"><img src="images/spatial.png" alt="Spatial Statistics" style="width: 56px; height: 56px; object-fit: contain;"></div>
      <div class="research-card-title">Spatial Statistics</div>
      <div class="research-card-text">
        Using geostatistical methods, kriging, and spatial copula frameworks for
        environmental monitoring, regional risk mapping, and wastewater surveillance.
        This includes Bayesian spatial modelling for public health and insurance.
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- 5. Data Visualisation -->
  <div class="col-md-4">
    <div class="research-card">
      <div class="research-card-icon"><img src="images/visualisation.png" alt="Data Visualisation" style="width: 56px; height: 56px; object-fit: contain;"></div>
      <div class="research-card-title">Data Visualisation</div>
      <div class="research-card-text">
        Developing multivariate visualisation techniques including biplots,
        principal surfaces, and interactive dashboards. This includes RShiny
        applications and methods for exploring high-dimensional actuarial data.
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- 6. Risk & Insurance Analytics -->
  <div class="col-md-4">
    <div class="research-card">
      <div class="research-card-icon"><img src="images/risk.jpg" alt="Risk and Insurance" style="width: 56px; height: 56px; object-fit: contain;"></div>
      <div class="research-card-title">Risk & Insurance Analytics</div>
      <div class="research-card-text">
        Developing pricing, reserving, and capital assessment models for
        general and life insurance. This includes catastrophe modelling,
        dependence structures, and stochastic simulations for portfolio risk.
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<!-- Current Projects Section -->
<div class="bg-light-section" style="padding: 5rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-title-wrapper">
      <span class="section-badge badge-gold">Current Work</span>
      <h2>Projects in Progress</h2>
      <div class="gold-line"></div>
      <p style="color: #666; max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto; font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.8;">
        The lab is establishing its research programme. Current student
        projects are underway, with outputs expected in the coming years.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="row g-4 justify-content-center">
      <div class="col-lg-8">
        <div style="border-left: 3px solid var(--color-navy); padding-left: 2rem;">

          <div style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">
            <p style="font-weight: 600; color: var(--color-navy) !important; margin-bottom: 0.25rem;">
              Climate Risk and Insurance Pricing
            </p>
            <p style="color: #666; font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.7;">
              Odey Mofokeng (MSc Statistics) is developing Bayesian spatial
              copula frameworks for insurance pricing in KwaZulu-Natal,
              examining flood and drought risk through geostatistical methods.
            </p>
          </div>

          <div style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">
            <p style="font-weight: 600; color: var(--color-navy) !important; margin-bottom: 0.25rem;">
              Climate Exposure and Health Risk
            </p>
            <p style="color: #666; font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.7;">
              Aphiwe Ngcobo (Honours Statistics) is examining how extreme heat,
              drought, and heavy rainfall affect vulnerable populations in
              Gauteng, combining climate data with public health analysis.
            </p>
          </div>

          <div>
            <p style="font-weight: 600; color: var(--color-navy) !important; margin-bottom: 0.25rem;">
              Developing Collaborations
            </p>
            <p style="color: #666; font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.7;">
              We are building partnerships with industry and academic
              institutions to expand our research capacity and create
              opportunities for future publications and conference presentations.
            </p>
          </div>

        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

```
